problem.passage:
10. Read the passage in <A> and the tests in <B>, and follow the
directions.【4 points】
<A>
Mr. Lee and Ms. Min are both middle school English
1st teachers for graders, but their students’ English writing
proficiency is quite different from each other. The two
teachers have developed tests to assess their students’ abilities
to write using comparatives and superlatives as the target
forms.
Mr. Lee’s Assessment Note
◾I taught my students to write simple sentences using
comparatives and superlatives and provided sentence drill
activities to practice them in previous lessons. After that,
I designed a writing test to assess my students’ abilities to
make a simple sentence using one of the target forms.
Ms. Min’s Assessment Note
◾My students learned how to use comparatives and
superlatives in sentences. After they were able to write
sentences using the target forms accurately, I offered a
story-writing activity in class. Then, I made a test to assess
how well the students put sentences together to write a
story using the target forms.
<B>
Test 1
Directions: Based on the pictures, fill in each blank with
an appropriate comparative or superlative.

_extraction.note: 자동 추출 초안. passage/meta/answer 모두 수동 보완 필요.
